input.toml:
[server]
bind = "0.0.0.0:9090"

[storage]
backend = "s3"

[storage.s3]
bucket = "my-bucket"
region = "us-west-2"

[upstream.pypi]
enabled = true
url = "https://pypi.org"

[policies]
block_unlicensed = true
max_vuln_severity = "high"
allowed_licenses = ["MIT", "Apache-2.0"]

[auth]
enabled = true
tokens = ["secret-token"]
